svg.title: All array built-in methods grouped by category
svg.desc: Array methods grouped into 5 categories: Add Remove, Search, Transform, Loop, and Other utilities

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain push pop shift unshift splice with examples')
sendPrompt('Explain find indexOf includes filter with examples')
sendPrompt('Explain map filter reduce with real examples')
sendPrompt('Explain forEach for-of loops on arrays')
sendPrompt('Explain sort reverse join slice concat with examples')

svg.text: push/pop = END of array | shift/unshift = START of array
map = transform all | filter = keep some | reduce = collapse to one value
Click any box to ask me about it
